llm_output.summary: Customer says they were charged twice and asks for a duplicate payment refund.
llm_output.draft_reply: Thanks for reporting this. I found your note about a duplicate charge and prepared it for billing review. A team member will check the payment details before any refund action is taken.

llm_output.summary: Customer cannot log in after a password reset because the reset code appears expired.
llm_output.draft_reply: Thanks for the details. Please try requesting a fresh password reset link and use it within the same browser session. I have routed this to account support in case the reset token needs to be checked.

llm_output.summary: Customer reports repeated API 500 errors for the last 20 minutes while the status page appears normal.
llm_output.draft_reply: Thanks for reporting the API errors. I have routed this to technical support with the timing you provided so they can investigate the failing requests.

llm_output.summary: Customer requests account deletion and removal of stored data.
llm_output.draft_reply: Thanks for contacting us. I have prepared your account deletion request for human review so the team can confirm the correct process and required checks.

llm_output.summary: Customer asks about pricing differences between starter and team plans for 12 users.
llm_output.draft_reply: Thanks for your interest. I have routed your pricing question to the sales team so they can explain the plan differences for a 12-user setup.

llm_output.summary: Customer is angry about an app failure during a client meeting and asks for manager contact today.
llm_output.draft_reply: I am sorry this happened during your client meeting. I have escalated your message for manager review today so the team can follow up with the right context.

llm_output.summary: Customer reports a suspicious login alert and asks to secure the account.
llm_output.draft_reply: Thanks for reporting the suspicious login alert. I have escalated this for account security review. Please change your password if you can still access the account.

llm_output.summary: Customer says something is not working but does not provide enough detail to identify the issue.
llm_output.draft_reply: Thanks for reaching out. Could you share what you were trying to do, what happened, and any error message you saw? A support team member will review the details.
